steps.title: Identify the line of best fit
steps.content: Locate the straight line drawn through the scatterplot. This is the line of best fit.

steps.title: Count points above the line
steps.content:
Examine each of the 10 data points. Count how many lie strictly above the line (their y-value greater than the predicted y-value from the line). From the figure, there are 6 such points.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
